summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Windows Installer fsutil + retry-loop + write-test fixes (2026-07-16 iteration 2). All 23 tests passed with 100% success rate. Verified all NEW defensive measures: fsutil elevation probe (replacing net session), sc delete command, PythonService.exe in taskkill, 8-attempt retry loop with 2s delays, final guard with exit code 32, and write-test with exit code 5.
passed_tests: Regression: POST /api/agent/installer/download-init returns correct response (download_token, pairing_code DT-XXXX-XXXX, filename.zip, is_bundle=true, expires_in=300)
Regression: GET /api/agent/installer/download returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/zip, Content-Length exact match, ZIP integrity verified
Regression: ZIP layout correct (install.cmd/README.txt/bundle.json at root, 3 EXEs under payload/)
Regression: Pairing code in filename matches /api/agent/installer/verify endpoint
NEW: install.cmd uses 'fsutil dirty query %SYSTEMDRIVE%' as elevation probe (NOT 'net session')
NEW: install.cmd does NOT contain 'net session' anymore (replaced by fsutil)
NEW: install.cmd runs 'sc delete DigitalTwinAgent' inside the service-cleanup block
NEW: 'sc delete DigitalTwinAgent' comes AFTER 'sc stop DigitalTwinAgent' in correct order
NEW: 'sc delete' is inside the 'if %errorlevel% equ 0' block after 'sc query DigitalTwinAgent'
NEW: install.cmd includes PythonService.exe in taskkill targets (in addition to agent.exe/uninstaller.exe/DigitalTwinAgent.exe)
NEW: install.cmd has retry loop 'for /L %%i in (1,1,8)' for deleting agent.exe
NEW: Retry loop attempts 'del /F /Q %INSTALL_ROOT%\agent.exe'
NEW: Retry loop includes 'timeout /t 2 /nobreak' between attempts (8 x 2s = 16s total)
NEW: Retry loop is inside the 'if exist %INSTALL_ROOT%' cleanup block
NEW: install.cmd has final guard 'if exist %INSTALL_ROOT%\agent.exe' after retry loop
NEW: Final guard prints 'please REBOOT' message
NEW: Final guard exits with code 32
NEW: install.cmd has WRITE-TEST section that creates sentinel file .dt_writetest_%RANDOM%.tmp
NEW: WRITE-TEST section comes BEFORE 'pushd payload' (pre-flight check)
NEW: WRITE-TEST creates %INSTALL_ROOT% if missing
NEW: WRITE-TEST grants Administrators (S-1-5-32-544) full control before testing
NEW: WRITE-TEST has actionable diagnostic mentioning Controlled Folder Access / Group Policy / AppLocker
NEW: WRITE-TEST exits with code 5 if write fails
